Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a process model in DECLARE constraints for a loan application review process We are to add new constraints to mitigate bias based on sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Steps 1 We are to consider that the process might be biased For example a FinalDecision of Reject might occur more frequently after seeing attributes like ApplicantRace Minority without a proper check in between 2 We are to add constraints that enforce fairness The example given in the instructions suggests Coexistence for sensitive decisions Response or Succession Constraints Non succession Constraints 3 We are to preserve the DECLARE dictionary structure 4 We are to document the additions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets analyze the given model The model has existence StartApplication and FinalDecision must occur init StartApplication is the start coexistence StartApplication and FinalDecision must coexist response StartApplication must be followed by RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo must be followed by FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We are to add new constraints that involve sensitive attributes However note that the current model does not have any activities related to sensitive attributes or bias checks Therefore we must first introduce these activities as part of the constraints We are allowed to add new activities that are not in the original model

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets break down the suggested constraints a Coexistence for sensitive decisions For example if we have Approve Minority then we require ManualReview to coexist Similarly for Reject Minority b Response or Succession Ensure that a decision step cannot immediately follow a sensitive attribute disclosure without a BiasMitigationCheck c Non succession Prevent a direct succession from a sensitive attribute event to a decision event

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We assume that the process has the following activities StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject Approve Minority Reject Minority We want to ensure that If a sensitive attribute is checked CheckApplicantRace then a BiasMitigationCheck must occur response A decision must be preceded by a BiasMitigationCheck precedence For the sensitive decision variants a ManualReview must occur coexistence We also want to avoid direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to a decision nonchainsuccession

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to add coexistence for Approve Minority and Reject Minority with ManualReview response for CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck precedence for decisions to be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck nonchainsuccession for CheckApplicantRace to each decision activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We note that the original model has a FinalDecision activity We are introducing Approve and Reject as two possible outcomes We are going to keep the original constraints for FinalDecision and add the new ones We are going to merge the dictionaries for the same constraint types

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets construct the updated model Original model has certain constraints We are going to update coexistence response precedence nonchainsuccession Leave the other constraint types unchanged We are going to output the updated model as valid Python code Well also write a short explanation Lets code accordingly
